name: XR ULTRA PHYSICS SANDBOX 2: BATTLE MAYHEM

reviews.review_description:
I love this game so much because I like how when I hit the guys they always glitch and fling around which is so fun and goofy to watch so even though it does have bad things it’s actually pretty good and I love this game so much so whoever made this game, thank you because this game is super fun even though it’s buggy which doesn’t hurt me it makes me better
￼
To many bug and hard to work every thing and lots of the guns have to much collision
The game is amazing the most satisfying part is when you get the destructible crate on the side and you just whack it until it breaks I also love breaking the glass i just punch it and I love it

reviews.review_title: Ultra Fun Games does it again
reviews.review_description: This game is a fun destructible sandbox. Tons of weapons and enemies that you can spawn into different environments that are fully destructible. If you are a fan of sandbox style games this is a great option for Avery modest price. Not quite as polished as big budget entries but still awesome nonetheless. My one complaint is that the angle of your guns feels slightly off but I expect this one will still get plenty of attention from the dev based on his other work.

Tried for an hour or so tonight , graphics bold and colourful easy on the eye.Not sure about the buttons but that's just an individuals choice , weapons choice is great whole new fun aspect to what will be an immense VR game ,multilayer would bring it to a new level can't wait to watch it grow in stature and gameplay

This game is a pretty cool combat game that has a lot of great potentials. You get to fight AI robots in a sandbox using different types of weapons like guns, swords, and explosives in a variety of maps.  It reminds me of going paint ball shooting irl but with much better choice of weapons. Good way to exercise and get the heart pumping. Would be cool to add multiplayers. Can’t wait to see what’s in store for the upcoming updates. Good job developers.

More epic fighting battles.
Graphics improved and feels really good to play, once again more people need to experience this game, don’t sleep on this one, it’s worth your time.
It's simply unbelievable what is technically possible these days. Physics-based damage model and lots of different weapons to try out. A clear recommendation from me.
I've just played this game and it is a great game lots of weapons to choose I will be having hours of fun !
Physics are good. The weapon modelings are so detailed.
Lots of fun with the large assortment of weapons!
